message.content:
请为 CourtAssistant 项目设计深度重构架构方案。

## 当前问题
1. TextParser.kt - 249行，职责过多
2. WebViewActivity.kt - 677行，过于庞大
3. 代码重复：日期格式化、文件操作、Toast等
4. 缺少统一的数据访问层
5. 缺少统一的工具类

## 核心功能
1. 短信读取和解析
2. PDF 下载和解析
3. 日历同步
4. 文档管理

## 要求
1. 设计新的包结构
2. 定义每个模块的职责
3. 设计 Repository 模式
4. 设计统一的工具类结构
5. 提供清晰的模块依赖关系图

项目路径：C:\Users\Administrator\CourtAssistant

请提供详细的架构设计文档。

content.content:
1→package com.shanfuchun.courtassistant.service
     2→
     3→import java.util.regex.Pattern
     4→import java.util.Calendar
     5→import java.util.TimeZone
     6→
     7→data class HearingInfo(
     8→    val hearingTime: Long = 0,
     9→    val courtName: String = "",
    10→    val caseNo: String = "",
    11→    val location: String = "",
    12→    val partyName: String = "",
    13→    val judge: String = ""
    14→)
    15→
    16→object TextParser {
    17→
    18→    // Case number: (2024)鲁1312民初4967号 — tolerant of spaces between chars
    19→    private val CASE_NO_PATTERN = Pattern.compile(
    20→        "[（(]\\s*\\d{4}\\s*[）)]\\s*[京津沪渝冀豫云辽黑湘皖鲁新苏浙赣鄂桂甘晋蒙陕吉闽贵粤川青藏琼宁]" +
    21→        "\\s*\\d{2,4}\\s*[\\u4e00-\\u9fa5]{1,4}\\s*[\\u4e00-\\u9fa5]{0,2}\\d+\\s*号"
    22→    )
    23→
    24→    private val COURT_PATTERN = Pattern.compile(
    25→        "[\\u4e00-\\u9fa5]+(?:人民法院|人民法庭|人\\s*法院|仲裁委员会|仲裁院)"
    26→    )
    27→
    28→    // "应到处所" field in summons (may have newline before value)
    29→    private val SUMMONS_LOCATION = Pattern.compile(
    30→        "应到处所[\\s：:]*([\\u4e00-\\u9fa5\\d\\-—号楼层室A-Za-z第]+(?:审判庭|法庭|法院|室|庭))"
    31→    )
    32→    // "在...开庭" pattern from SMS notifications — tolerate spaces in 法 庭
    33→    private val SMS_LOCATION = Pattern.compile(
    34→        "在([\\u4e00-\\u9fa5\\d第]+(?:审\\s*判\\s*庭|法\\s*庭|法\\s*院|处\\s*所|室|庭))"
    35→    )
    36→    // Generic location
    37→    private val GENERIC_LOCATION = Pattern.compile(
    38→        "(?:地[点址]|法庭|审判庭|处所)[：:为在]\\s*([\\u4e00-\\u9fa5\\d\\-—号楼层室第A-Za-z]+)"
    39→    )
    40→
    41→    // Party name: supports company names up to 30 chars
    42→    private val PARTY_PATTERNS = listOf(
    43→        Pattern.compile("被传唤人[\\s：:]*([\\u4e00-\\u9fa5()（）\\d]{2,30})"),
    44→        Pattern.compile("(?:被告|原告|当事人|被申请人|申请人)[\\s：:]*([\\u4e00-\\u9fa5()（）\\d]{2,30})")
    45→    )
    46→
    47→    // Judge/handler — supports parenthesized names: 联系人 (刘国良)
    48→    private val JUDGE_PATTERN = Pattern.compile(
    49→        "(?:承办人|联系人|审判员)[\\s：:]*[（(]?([\\u4e00-\\u9fa5]{2,6})[）)]?"
    50→    )
    51→
    52→    // Time patterns ordered by specificity
    53→    private val TIME_PATTERNS = listOf(
    54→        // P0: 应到时间 2024年07月12日 10:00 (summons format with colon time)
    55→        Pattern.compile("(\\d{4})\\s*年\\s*(\\d{1,2})\\s*月\\s*(\\d{1,2})\\s*日\\s*(\\d{1,2})\\s*[：:]\\s*(\\d{2})"),
    56→        // P1: 2026年3月12日15时30分
    57→        Pattern.compile("(\\d{4})\\s*年\\s*(\\d{1,2})\\s*月\\s*(\\d{1,2})\\s*日\\s*(\\d{1,2})\\s*时\\s*(?:(\\d{1,2})\\s*分)?"),
    58→        // P2: 2026年3月12日 上午/下午 3点30分
    59→        Pattern.compile("(\\d{4})\\s*年\\s*(\\d{1,2})\\s*月\\s*(\\d{1,2})\\s*日\\s*(?:(上午|下午|晚上))?\\s*(\\d{1,2})\\s*[点时]\\s*(?:(\\d{1,2})\\s*分)?"),
    60→        // P3: 2026-03-12 15:00 or 2026/03/12 15:00
    61→        Pattern.compile("(\\d{4})[-/](\\d{1,2})[-/](\\d{1,2})\\s+(\\d{1,2}):(\\d{2})"),
    62→        // P4: 3月12日15时30分 (no year)
    63→        Pattern.compile("(?<!\\d)(\\d{1,2})\\s*月\\s*(\\d{1,2})\\s*日\\s*(\\d{1,2})\\s*时\\s*(?:(\\d{1,2})\\s*分)?"),
    64→        // P5: 3月12日 下午3点
    65→        Pattern.compile("(?<!\\d)(\\d{1,2})\\s*月\\s*(\\d{1,2})\\s*日\\s*(?:(上午|下午|晚上))?\\s*(\\d{1,2})\\s*[点时]\\s*(?:(\\d{1,2})\\s*分)?"),
    66→        // P6: SMS "定于...年...月...日...时...分" with scattered text
    67→        Pattern.compile("定于[\\s\\S]{0,10}?(\\d{4})\\s*年\\s*(\\d{1,2})\\s*月\\s*(\\d{1,2})\\s*日\\s*(\\d{1,2})\\s*时\\s*(?:(\\d{1,2})\\s*分)?")
    68→    )
    69→
    70→    private val URL_PATTERN = Pattern.compile(
    71→        "https?://[\\w\\-._~:/?#\\[\\]@!$&'()*+,;=%]+"
    72→    )
    73→
    74→    fun parse(text: String): HearingInfo {
    75→        val normalized = cleanOcrNoise(text)
    76→        return HearingInfo(
    77→            hearingTime = extractTime(normalized),
    78→            courtName = extractFirst(COURT_PATTERN, normalized),
    79→            caseNo = extractCaseNo(normalized),
    80→            location = extractLocation(normalized),
    81→            partyName = extractParty(normalized),
    82→            judge = extractGroup(JUDGE_PATTERN, normalized, 1)
    83→        )
    84→    }
    85→
    86→    /**
    87→     * Clean OCR noise: stray brackets around digits, line breaks mid-field,
    88→     * extra trailing digits on year/case number, etc.
    89→     * Preserves case number parentheses like (2024).
    90→     */
    91→    fun cleanOcrNoise(text: String): String {
    92→        var c = text.replace("\r\n", "\n").replace("\r", "\n")
    93→        // Join lines
    94→        c = c.replace("\n", " ")
    95→        // Protect case number parens: (2024) or （2024） — mark them
    96→        c = c.replace(Regex("[（(](\\d{4})[）)]"), "【CASE\\1】")
    97→        // Remove brackets/parens wrapping digits: (14) [7]
    98→        c = c.replace(Regex("[\\[（(]\\s*(\\d+)\\s*[\\]）)]"), "$1")
    99→        // Remove orphan opening bracket before digit
   100→        c = c.replace(Regex("[\\[（(]\\s*(\\d+)"), "$1")
   101→        // Remove orphan closing bracket after digit
   102→        c = c.replace(Regex("(\\d+)\\s*[\\]）)]"), "$1")
   103→        // Restore case number parens
   104→        c = c.replace(Regex("【CASE(\\d{4})】"), "($1)")
   105→        // Fix year with extra trailing digit before 年: 20261年 -> 2026年
   106→        c = c.replace(Regex("(\\d{4})\\d(年)"), "$1$2")
   107→        // Fix case number trailing digit after 号: 38161号1 -> 38161号
   108→        c = c.replace(Regex("(号)\\d(\\s)"), "$1$2")
   109→        // Collapse multiple spaces
   110→        c = c.replace(Regex("\\s+"), " ").trim()
   111→        return c
   112→    }
   113→
   114→    fun extractUrls(text: String): List<String> {
   115→        val m = URL_PATTERN.matcher(text)
   116→        val urls = mutableListOf<String>()
   117→        while (m.find()) urls.add(m.group())
   118→        return urls
   119→    }
   120→
   121→    private fun extractCaseNo(text: String): String {
   122→        // Try standard pattern: (2024)鲁1312民初4967号
   123→        val m = CASE_NO_PATTERN.matcher(text)
   124→        if (m.find()) return m.group().replace("\\s+".toRegex(), "")
   125→        // Fallback with parens
   126→        val loose = Pattern.compile("[（(]\\s*\\d{4}\\s*[）)]\\s*[\\u4e00-\\u9fa5\\d]+号")
   127→        val m2 = loose.matcher(text)
   128→        if (m2.find()) return m2.group().replace("\\s+".toRegex(), "")
   129→        // Fallback without parens (OCR stripped them): 2024鲁1312民初4967号
   130→        val noParen = Pattern.compile(
   131→            "\\b(\\d{4})[\\s]*[京津沪渝冀豫云辽黑湘皖鲁新苏浙赣鄂桂甘晋蒙陕吉闽贵粤川青藏琼宁]" +
   132→            "[\\s]*\\d{2,4}[\\s]*[\\u4e00-\\u9fa5]{1,4}\\d+[\\s]*号"
   133→        )
   134→        val m3 = noParen.matcher(text)
   135→        if (m3.find()) return "(" + m3.group().replace("\\s+".toRegex(), "").replaceFirst(Regex("^(\\d{4})"), "$1)")
   136→        return ""
   137→    }
   138→
   139→    private fun extractLocation(text: String): String {
   140→        for (p in listOf(SUMMONS_LOCATION, SMS_LOCATION, GENERIC_LOCATION)) {
   141→            val m = p.matcher(text)
   142→            if (m.find()) return (m.group(1) ?: "").replace(" ", "").trim()
   143→        }
   144→        return ""
   145→    }
   146→
   147→    private fun extractParty(text: String): String {
   148→        val blacklist = listOf("传票", "经传", "传唤")
   149→        for (p in PARTY_PATTERNS) {
   150→            val m = p.matcher(text)
   151→            if (m.find()) {
   152→                val v = (m.group(1) ?: "").trim()
   153→                if (blacklist.none { v.contains(it) }) return v
   154→            }
   155→        }
   156→        return ""
   157→    }
   158→
   159→    fun extractTime(text: String): Long {
   160→        for (i in TIME_PATTERNS.indices) {
   161→            val m = TIME_PATTERNS[i].matcher(text)
   162→            while (m.find()) {
   163→                val t = parseMatchToTime(m, i)
   164→                if (t > 0) return t
   165→            }
   166→        }
   167→        return 0
   168→    }
   169→
   170→    private fun validDate(month: Int, day: Int, hour: Int, minute: Int): Boolean {
   171→        return month in 1..12 && day in 1..31 && hour in 0..23 && minute in 0..59
   172→    }
   173→
   174→    private fun parseMatchToTime(m: java.util.regex.Matcher, patternIdx: Int): Long {
   175→        val cal = Calendar.getInstance(TimeZone.getTimeZone("Asia/Shanghai"))
   176→        try {
   177→            when (patternIdx) {
   178→                0 -> { // 2024年07月12日 10:00
   179→                    val y = m.group(1).toInt(); val mo = m.group(2).toInt()
   180→                    val d = m.group(3).toInt(); val h = m.group(4).toInt(); val mi = m.group(5).toInt()
   181→                    if (!validDate(mo, d, h, mi)) return 0
   182→                    cal.set(y, mo - 1, d, h, mi, 0)
   183→                }
   184→                1, 6 -> { // 2026年3月12日15时30分 / 定于...
   185→                    val y = m.group(1).toInt(); val mo = m.group(2).toInt()
   186→                    val d = m.group(3).toInt(); val h = m.group(4).toInt()
   187→                    val mi = m.group(5)?.toIntOrNull() ?: 0
   188→                    if (!validDate(mo, d, h, mi)) return 0
   189→                    cal.set(y, mo - 1, d, h, mi, 0)
   190→                }
   191→                2 -> { // 2026年3月12日 上午/下午 3点30分
   192→                    val y = m.group(1).toInt(); val mo = m.group(2).toInt()
   193→                    val d = m.group(3).toInt()
   194→                    var hour = m.group(5).toInt()
   195→                    val period = m.group(4)
   196→                    if (period == "下午" || period == "晚上") { if (hour < 12) hour += 12 }
   197→                    else if (period == "上午" && hour == 12) hour = 0
   198→                    val mi = m.group(6)?.toIntOrNull() ?: 0
   199→                    if (!validDate(mo, d, hour, mi)) return 0
   200→                    cal.set(y, mo - 1, d, hour, mi, 0)
   201→                }
   202→                3 -> { // 2026-03-12 15:00
   203→                    val y = m.group(1).toInt(); val mo = m.group(2).toInt()
   204→                    val d = m.group(3).toInt(); val h = m.group(4).toInt(); val mi = m.group(5).toInt()
   205→                    if (!validDate(mo, d, h, mi)) return 0
   206→                    cal.set(y, mo - 1, d, h, mi, 0)
   207→                }
   208→                4 -> { // 3月12日15时30分
   209→                    val mo = m.group(1).toInt(); val d = m.group(2).toInt()
   210→                    val h = m.group(3).toInt(); val mi = m.group(4)?.toIntOrNull() ?: 0
   211→                    if (!validDate(mo, d, h, mi)) return 0
   212→                    cal.set(Calendar.MONTH, mo - 1)
   213→                    cal.set(Calendar.DAY_OF_MONTH, d)
   214→                    cal.set(Calendar.HOUR_OF_DAY, h)
   215→                    cal.set(Calendar.MINUTE, mi)
   216→                    cal.set(Calendar.SECOND, 0)
   217→                }
   218→                5 -> { // 3月12日 下午3点
   219→                    val mo = m.group(1).toInt(); val d = m.group(2).toInt()
   220→                    var hour = m.group(4).toInt()
   221→                    val period = m.group(3)
   222→                    if (period == "下午" || period == "晚上") { if (hour < 12) hour += 12 }
   223→                    else if (period == "上午" && hour == 12) hour = 0
   224→                    val mi = m.group(5)?.toIntOrNull() ?: 0
   225→                    if (!validDate(mo, d, hour, mi)) return 0
   226→                    cal.set(Calendar.MONTH, mo - 1)
   227→                    cal.set(Calendar.DAY_OF_MONTH, d)
   228→                    cal.set(Calendar.HOUR_OF_DAY, hour)
   229→                    cal.set(Calendar.MINUTE, mi)
   230→                    cal.set(Calendar.SECOND, 0)
   231→                }
   232→            }
   233→            cal.set(Calendar.MILLISECOND, 0)
   234→            return cal.timeInMillis
   235→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   236→            return 0
   237→        }
   238→    }
   239→
   240→    private fun extractFirst(p: Pattern, text: String): String {
   241→        val m = p.matcher(text)
   242→        return if (m.find()) m.group().trim() else ""
   243→    }
   244→
   245→    private fun extractGroup(p: Pattern, text: String, group: Int): String {
   246→        val m = p.matcher(text)
   247→        return if (m.find()) (m.group(group) ?: "").trim() else ""
   248→    }
   249→}

    10→@Database(
    11→    entities = [SmsRecord::class, DocumentRecord::class, SummonsInfo::class, CalendarSyncRecord::class],
    12→    version = 2,
    13→    exportSchema = false
    14→)
    15→abstract class AppDatabase : RoomDatabase() {
    16→    abstract fun smsDao(): SmsDao
    17→    abstract fun documentDao(): DocumentDao
    18→    abstract fun summonsDao(): SummonsDao
    19→    abstract fun calendarSyncDao(): CalendarSyncDao
    20→
    21→    companion object {
    22→        @Volatile private var INSTANCE: AppDatabase? = null
    23→
    24→        private val MIGRATION_1_2 = object : Migration(1, 2) {
    25→            override fun migrate(db: SupportSQLiteDatabase) {
    26→                db.execSQL("ALTER TABLE sms_record ADD COLUMN hasSummons INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0")
    27→                db.execSQL("ALTER TABLE sms_record ADD COLUMN courtName TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT ''")
    28→                db.execSQL("ALTER TABLE sms_record ADD COLUMN partyName TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT ''")
    29→                db.execSQL("ALTER TABLE document_record ADD COLUMN displayName TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT ''")
    30→            }
    31→        }
    32→
    33→        fun getInstance(context: Context): AppDatabase =
    34→            INSTANCE ?: synchronized(this) {
    35→                INSTANCE ?: Room.databaseBuilder(
    36→                    context.applicationContext, AppDatabase::class.java, "court_assistant.db"

1→package com.shanfuchun.courtassistant.service
     2→
     3→import android.content.ContentValues
     4→import android.content.Context
     5→import android.provider.CalendarContract
     6→import com.shanfuchun.courtassistant.data.CalendarSyncRecord
     7→import com.shanfuchun.courtassistant.data.AppDatabase
     8→import java.util.TimeZone
     9→
    10→object CalendarHelper {
    11→
    12→    fun createEvent(
    13→        context: Context,
    14→        title: String,
    15→        startTime: Long,
    16→        description: String = "",
    17→        location: String = "",
    18→        reminderMinutes: List<Int> = listOf(60, 1440)
    19→    ): Long {
    20→        val calId = getDefaultCalendarId(context) ?: return -1
    21→        val values = ContentValues().apply {
    22→            put(CalendarContract.Events.CALENDAR_ID, calId)
    23→            put(CalendarContract.Events.TITLE, title)
    24→            put(CalendarContract.Events.DTSTART, startTime)
    25→            put(CalendarContract.Events.DTEND, startTime + 3600_000)
    26→            put(CalendarContract.Events.DESCRIPTION, description)
    27→            put(CalendarContract.Events.EVENT_LOCATION, location)
    28→            put(CalendarContract.Events.EVENT_TIMEZONE, TimeZone.getDefault().id)
    29→        }
    30→        val uri = context.contentResolver.insert(CalendarContract.Events.CONTENT_URI, values) ?: return -1
    31→        val eventId = uri.lastPathSegment?.toLongOrNull() ?: return -1
    32→        for (min in reminderMinutes) {
    33→            val rv = ContentValues().apply {
    34→                put(CalendarContract.Reminders.EVENT_ID, eventId)
    35→                put(CalendarContract.Reminders.MINUTES, min)
    36→                put(CalendarContract.Reminders.METHOD, CalendarContract.Reminders.METHOD_ALERT)
    37→            }
    38→            context.contentResolver.insert(CalendarContract.Reminders.CONTENT_URI, rv)
    39→        }
    40→        return eventId
    41→    }
    42→
    43→    private fun getDefaultCalendarId(context: Context): Long? {
    44→        val cursor = context.contentResolver.query(
    45→            CalendarContract.Calendars.CONTENT_URI,
    46→            arrayOf(CalendarContract.Calendars._ID),
    47→            "${CalendarContract.Calendars.VISIBLE} = 1",
    48→            null, "${CalendarContract.Calendars._ID} ASC"
    49→        )
    50→        cursor?.use { if (it.moveToFirst()) return it.getLong(0) }
    51→        return null
    52→    }
    53→
    54→    suspend fun syncHearing(
    55→        context: Context,
    56→        db: AppDatabase,
    57→        info: HearingInfo,
    58→        sourceId: Long,
    59→        sourceType: String,
    60→        smsBody: String = "",
    61→        pdfFilePath: String = ""
    62→    ): Boolean {
    63→        if (info.hearingTime <= 0) return false
    64→        val dedupKey = buildDedupKey(info, sourceId)
    65→        val existing = db.calendarSyncDao().findByDedupKey(dedupKey)
    66→        if (existing != null) return false
    67→
    68→        val title = buildTitle(info)
    69→        val desc = buildDescription(info, smsBody, pdfFilePath)
    70→        val eventId = createEvent(context, title, info.hearingTime, desc, info.location)
    71→        if (eventId < 0) return false
    72→
    73→        db.calendarSyncDao().insert(
    74→            CalendarSyncRecord(
    75→                sourceId = sourceId, sourceType = sourceType,
    76→                eventId = eventId, syncStatus = 1,
    77→                dedupKey = dedupKey, syncedAt = System.currentTimeMillis()
    78→            )
    79→        )
    80→        return true
    81→    }
    82→
    83→    private fun buildDedupKey(info: HearingInfo, sourceId: Long): String {
    84→        // 优先用案号+时间+法院去重（短信和PDF来源共享同一key）
    85→        if (info.caseNo.isNotEmpty()) {
    86→            return "${info.caseNo}_${info.hearingTime}"
    87→        }
    88→        // 无案号时用时间+法院+当事人去重
    89→        if (info.hearingTime > 0 && (info.courtName.isNotEmpty() || info.partyName.isNotEmpty())) {
    90→            return "${info.hearingTime}_${info.courtName}_${info.partyName}"
    91→        }
    92→        return "${sourceId}_${info.hearingTime}"
    93→    }
    94→
    95→    private fun buildTitle(info: HearingInfo): String {
    96→        val parts = mutableListOf<String>()
    97→        if (info.courtName.isNotEmpty()) parts.add(shortenCourtName(info.courtName))
    98→        parts.add("开庭")
    99→        if (info.partyName.isNotEmpty()) parts.add(shortenPartyName(info.partyName))
   100→        else if (info.caseNo.isNotEmpty()) parts.add(info.caseNo)
   101→        return parts.joinToString(" ")
   102→    }
   103→
   104→    private fun buildDescription(info: HearingInfo, smsBody: String, pdfFilePath: String): String {
   105→        val sb = StringBuilder()
   106→        if (info.caseNo.isNotEmpty()) sb.appendLine("案号：${info.caseNo}")
   107→        if (info.courtName.isNotEmpty()) sb.appendLine("法院：${info.courtName}")
   108→        if (info.partyName.isNotEmpty()) sb.appendLine("当事人：${info.partyName}")
   109→        if (info.location.isNotEmpty()) sb.appendLine("地点：${info.location}")
   110→        if (info.judge.isNotEmpty()) sb.appendLine("承办人：${info.judge}")
   111→        if (pdfFilePath.isNotEmpty()) sb.appendLine("\n传票文件：$pdfFilePath")
   112→        if (smsBody.isNotEmpty()) sb.appendLine("\n短信原文：$smsBody")
   113→        return sb.toString().trim()
   114→    }
   115→
   116→    /** 山东省临沂市中级人民法院→临沂中院, 兰山区人民法院→兰山法院, 山东省高级人民法院→山东高院 */
   117→    fun shortenCourtName(name: String): String {
   118→        // 最高人民法院
   119→        if (name.contains("最高人民法院")) return "最高法院"
   120→        // XX省高级人民法院 → XX高院
   121→        val highMatch = Regex("(\\S{2,3}?)省?高级人民法院").find(name)
   122→        if (highMatch != null) return "${highMatch.groupValues[1]}高院"
   123→        // XX市中级人民法院 → XX中院
   124→        val midMatch = Regex("(\\S{2,4}?)(?:市|自治州)?中级人民法院").find(name)
   125→        if (midMatch != null) return "${midMatch.groupValues[1]}中院"
   126→        // XX区/县人民法院 → XX法院
   127→        val baseMatch = Regex("(\\S{2,4}?)(?:区|县|市)?人民法院").find(name)
   128→        if (baseMatch != null) return "${baseMatch.groupValues[1]}法院"
   129→        // XX人民法庭 → XX法庭
   130→        val courtMatch = Regex("(\\S{2,4}?)人民法庭").find(name)
   131→        if (courtMatch != null) return "${courtMatch.groupValues[1]}法庭"
   132→        // 仲裁
   133→        val arbMatch = Regex("(\\S{2,6}?)仲裁委员会").find(name)
   134→        if (arbMatch != null) return "${arbMatch.groupValues[1]}仲裁委"
   135→        return name
   136→    }
   137→
   138→    /** 公司名简化：超过6字取前4字+... */
   139→    fun shortenPartyName(name: String): String {
   140→        if (name.length <= 6) return name
   141→        // 个人名字一般2-4字，不缩
   142→        if (!name.contains("公司") && !name.contains("有限") && !name.contains("集团") && name.length <= 8) return name
   143→        return name.take(4) + "..."
   144→    }
   145→}

     3→import android.content.Context
     4→import kotlinx.coroutines.Dispatchers
     5→import kotlinx.coroutines.withContext
     6→import okhttp3.MediaType.Companion.toMediaType
     7→import okhttp3.OkHttpClient
     8→import okhttp3.Request
     9→import okhttp3.RequestBody.Companion.toRequestBody
    10→import org.json.JSONArray
    11→import org.json.JSONObject
    12→import java.text.SimpleDateFormat
    13→import java.util.Locale
    14→import java.util.TimeZone
    15→import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit
    16→
    17→object AiParser {
    18→
    19→    private val client = OkHttpClient.Builder()
    20→        .connectTimeout(15, TimeUnit.SECONDS)
    21→        .readTimeout(30, TimeUnit.SECONDS)
    22→        .build()
    23→
    24→    private val JSON_TYPE = "application/json; charset=utf-8".toMediaType()
    25→
    26→    suspend fun enhance(context: Context, text: String, regexResult: HearingInfo): HearingInfo {
    27→        val key = context.getSharedPreferences("settings", Context.MODE_PRIVATE)
    28→            .getString("ai_api_key", null)
    29→        if (key.isNullOrBlank()) return regexResult
    30→
    31→        return withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
    32→            try {
    33→                val prompt = "从以下法律文书中提取信息，以JSON格式返回，字段：\n" +
    34→                    "hearingTime(格式yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm), courtName, caseNo, location, partyName, judge\n" +
    35→                    "仅返回JSON，无其他文字。\n文书内容：\n$text"
    36→
    37→                val body = JSONObject().apply {
    38→                    put("model", "qwen-plus")
    39→                    put("messages", JSONArray().apply {
    40→                        put(JSONObject().put("role", "user").put("content", prompt))
    41→                    })
    42→                }.toString().toRequestBody(JSON_TYPE)
    43→
    44→                val req = Request.Builder()
    45→                    .url("https://dashscope.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode/v1/chat/completions")
    46→                    .addHeader("Authorization", "Bearer $key")
    47→                    .post(body)
    48→                    .build()
    49→
    50→                val resp = client.newCall(req).execute()
    51→                if (!resp.isSuccessful) return@withContext regexResult
    52→
    53→                val raw = JSONObject(resp.body!!.string())
    54→                    .getJSONArray("choices").getJSONObject(0)
    55→                    .getJSONObject("message").getString("content")
    56→                    .replace(Regex("```json\\s*|```"), "").trim()
    57→
    58→                merge(regexResult, JSONObject(raw))
    59→            } catch (_: Exception) {
    60→                regexResult
    61→            }
    62→        }
    63→    }
    64→
    65→    private fun merge(base: HearingInfo, j: JSONObject): HearingInfo {
    66→        val sdf = SimpleDateFormat("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm", Locale.CHINA).apply {
    67→            timeZone = TimeZone.getTimeZone("Asia/Shanghai")
    68→        }
    69→        return base.copy(
    70→            hearingTime = if (base.hearingTime != 0L) base.hearingTime
    71→                else try { sdf.parse(j.optString("hearingTime"))?.time ?: 0L } catch (_: Exception) { 0L },
    72→            courtName = base.courtName.ifEmpty { j.optString("courtName", "") },
    73→            caseNo = base.caseNo.ifEmpty { j.optString("caseNo", "") },
    74→            location = base.location.ifEmpty { j.optString("location", "") },
    75→            partyName = base.partyName.ifEmpty { j.optString("partyName", "") },
    76→            judge = base.judge.ifEmpty { j.optString("judge", "") }
    77→        )
    78→    }
    79→}
    80→

    11→import com.shanfuchun.courtassistant.service.PdfDownloader
    12→import com.shanfuchun.courtassistant.service.TextParser
    13→import kotlinx.coroutines.Dispatchers

    15→import kotlinx.coroutines.withContext
    16→
    17→object SmsProcessor {
    18→    private const val TAG = "CourtAssistant"
    19→
    20→    suspend fun process(context: Context, db: AppDatabase, sms: SmsRecord) {
    21→        Log.d(TAG, "SmsProcessor: processing sms id=${sms.id}")
    22→        val info = TextParser.parse(sms.body)
    23→        Log.d(TAG, "SmsProcessor: parsed info: time=${info.hearingTime} court=${info.courtName} case=${info.caseNo}")
    24→
    25→        // 回写 courtName/partyName 到短信记录
    26→        if (info.courtName.isNotEmpty() || info.partyName.isNotEmpty()) {
    27→            db.smsDao().update(sms.copy(courtName = info.courtName, partyName = info.partyName))
    28→        }
    29→
    30→        // 同步开庭信息到日历
    31→        if (info.hearingTime > 0) {
    32→            val synced = CalendarHelper.syncHearing(context, db, info, sms.id, "sms", sms.body)
    33→            Log.d(TAG, "SmsProcessor: calendar synced=$synced")
    34→        }
    35→
    36→        // 提取URL
    37→        val urls = TextParser.extractUrls(sms.body)
    38→        Log.d(TAG, "SmsProcessor: found ${urls.size} urls: $urls")
    39→
    40→        if (urls.isNotEmpty()) {
    41→            // 先尝试使用 PdfDownloader 直接下载（适用于直接PDF链接）
    42→            var webViewNeeded = false
    43→
    44→            for (url in urls) {
    45→                try {
    46→                    // 检查是否是SPA页面（包含hash路由）
    47→                    val isSpa = url.contains("#") ||
    48→                                 url.contains("/#/") ||
    49→                                 url.contains("zxfw.court.gov.cn") ||
    50→                                 url.contains("wenshu.court.gov.cn")
    51→
    52→                    if (isSpa) {

    20→class SmsReceiver : BroadcastReceiver() {
    21→    override fun onReceive(context: Context, intent: Intent) {
    22→        if (intent.action != Telephony.Sms.Intents.SMS_RECEIVED_ACTION) return
    23→        val messages = Telephony.Sms.Intents.getMessagesFromIntent(intent) ?: return
    24→        val grouped = mutableMapOf<String, StringBuilder>()
    25→        for (msg in messages) {
    26→            val addr = msg.displayOriginatingAddress ?: continue
    27→            if (!SmsReader.is12368(addr)) continue
    28→            grouped.getOrPut(addr) { StringBuilder() }.append(msg.displayMessageBody ?: "")
    29→        }
    30→        val app = context.applicationContext as App
    31→        CoroutineScope(Dispatchers.IO).launch {
    32→            for ((addr, body) in grouped) {
    33→                val text = body.toString()
    34→                val urls = TextParser.extractUrls(text)
    35→                val record = SmsRecord(sender = addr, body = text, receiveTime = System.currentTimeMillis(), hasLink = urls.isNotEmpty())
    36→                val id = app.db.smsDao().insert(record)
    37→                if (id > 0) {
    38→                    SmsProcessor.process(context, app.db, record.copy(id = id))
    39→                    showNotification(context, text)
    40→                }
    41→            }
    42→        }
    43→    }
    44→
    45→    private fun showNotification(context: Context, body: String) {
    46→        val openIntent = PendingIntent.getActivity(
    47→            context, 0,
    48→            Intent(context, MainActivity::class.java).apply { flags = Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_NEW_TASK or Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_CLEAR_TOP },
    49→            PendingIntent.FLAG_UPDATE_CURRENT or PendingIntent.FLAG_IMMUTABLE
    50→        )
    51→        val notification = NotificationCompat.Builder(context, App.CHANNEL_ID)
    52→            .setSmallIcon(R.mipmap.ic_launcher)
    53→            .setContentTitle("12368 法院通知")
    54→            .setContentText(body.take(60))
    55→            .setStyle(NotificationCompat.BigTextStyle().bigText(body))
    56→            .setContentIntent(openIntent)
    57→            .setAutoCancel(true)
    58→            .addAction(0, "查看详情", openIntent)
    59→            .build()
    60→        try {
    61→            NotificationManagerCompat.from(context).notify(System.currentTimeMillis().toInt(), notification)
    62→        } catch (_: SecurityException) { }
    63→    }

1→package com.shanfuchun.courtassistant.service
     2→
     3→import android.content.ContentResolver
     4→import android.database.Cursor
     5→import android.net.Uri
     6→import com.shanfuchun.courtassistant.data.SmsRecord
     7→
     8→object SmsReader {
     9→    private const val SENDER_12368 = "12368"
    10→
    11→    fun readAll(resolver: ContentResolver, sinceTime: Long = 0): List<SmsRecord> {
    12→        val list = mutableListOf<SmsRecord>()
    13→        val uri = Uri.parse("content://sms/inbox")
    14→        val selection = if (sinceTime > 0) "date > ?" else null
    15→        val args = if (sinceTime > 0) arrayOf(sinceTime.toString()) else null
    16→        val cursor: Cursor? = resolver.query(uri, arrayOf("_id", "address", "body", "date"), selection, args, "date DESC")
    17→        cursor?.use {
    18→            val iAddr = it.getColumnIndex("address")
    19→            val iBody = it.getColumnIndex("body")
    20→            val iDate = it.getColumnIndex("date")
    21→            while (it.moveToNext()) {
    22→                val addr = it.getString(iAddr) ?: continue
    23→                if (!is12368(addr)) continue
    24→                val body = it.getString(iBody) ?: ""
    25→                val date = it.getLong(iDate)
    26→                val urls = TextParser.extractUrls(body)
    27→                list.add(SmsRecord(sender = addr, body = body, receiveTime = date, hasLink = urls.isNotEmpty()))
    28→            }
    29→        }
    30→        return list
    31→    }
    32→
    33→    fun is12368(address: String): Boolean {
    34→        val cleaned = address.replace("+86", "").replace(" ", "").replace("-", "").trim()
    35→        return cleaned.contains(SENDER_12368)
    36→    }
    37→}

### 1.2 关键问题识别

#### 1.2.1 TextParser.kt 职责过多 (249行)
- 正则模式定义 (15+ patterns)
- OCR噪声清理
- URL提取
- 案号/法院/地点/当事人/法官提取
- 时间解析 (6种模式)
- 数据类 HearingInfo 混在一起

#### 1.2.2 WebViewActivity.kt 过于庞大 (677行)
- WebView配置 (JavaScript、缓存、拦截器)
- PDF下载逻辑
- 自动扫描逻辑
- JavaScript注入
- UI状态管理
- 数据库操作
- 网络请求
- 文件操作

#### 1.2.3 代码重复
**日期格式化重复 (5处):**
- `DocAdapter.kt`: `SimpleDateFormat("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm", Locale.CHINA)`
- `SmsAdapter.kt`: `SimpleDateFormat("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm", Locale.CHINA)`
- `SmsMenuAdapter.kt`: `SimpleDateFormat("MM-dd HH:mm", Locale.CHINA)`
- `AiParser.kt`: `SimpleDateFormat("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm", Locale.CHINA)`
- `SettingsFragment.kt`: `SimpleDateFormat("yyyyMMdd'T'HHmmss", Locale.CHINA)`

**Toast调用重复 (16处):**
- DocsFragment.kt: 8处
- SmsFragment.kt: 1处
- SettingsFragment.kt: 3处
- MainActivity.kt: 1处
- PdfListActivity.kt: 3处

**文件操作重复 (多出):**
- `File(dir, "pdfs").also { it.mkdirs() }` 在多个文件重复
- PDF下载逻辑在 PdfDownloader.kt、WebViewActivity.kt、PdfListActivity.kt 中重复

#### 1.2.4 数据访问层问题
- 直接在 UI 层调用 DAO (MainViewModel.kt)
- 服务层直接持有 Database 引用
- 缺少统一的业务逻辑层

#### 1.2.5 缺少统一的工具类
- 无统一的日志工具
- 无统一的 Toast 工具
- 无统一的日期格式化工具
- 无统一的文件操作工具

### 2.3 Repository 模式设计

#### 2.3.1 Repository 接口定义
```kotlin
// domain/repository/ISmsRepository.kt
interface ISmsRepository {
    Flowable<List<Sms>> observeAll()
    suspend fun getAll(): List<Sms>
    suspend fun getById(id: Long): Sms?
    suspend fun insert(sms: Sms): Long
    suspend fun update(sms: Sms)
    suspend fun search(query: String): List<Sms>
    suspend fun getLatestTime(): Long?
}
```

#### 2.3.2 Repository 实现
```kotlin
// data/repository/SmsRepository.kt
class SmsRepository @Inject constructor(
    private val smsDao: SmsDao,
    private val smsMapper: SmsMapper
) : ISmsRepository {
    
    override fun observeAll(): Flow<List<Sms>> {
        return smsDao.getAll()
            .map { entities -> entities.map { smsMapper.toDomain(it) } }
    }
    
    override suspend fun insert(sms: Sms): Long {
        return smsDao.insert(smsMapper.toEntity(sms))
    }
    // ...
}
```

#### 2.3.3 Mapper (Entity <-> Domain)
```kotlin
// data/mapper/SmsMapper.kt
class SmsMapper {
    fun toDomain(entity: SmsEntity): Sms {
        return Sms(
            id = entity.id,
            sender = entity.sender,
            body = entity.body,
            receiveTime = entity.receiveTime,
            hasLink = entity.hasLink,
            parseStatus = ParseStatus.fromValue(entity.parseStatus),
            documentIds = entity.documentIds.split(","),
            hasSummons = entity.hasSummons,
            courtName = entity.courtName,
            partyName = entity.partyName
        )
    }
    
    fun toEntity(domain: Sms): SmsEntity {
        return SmsEntity(
            id = domain.id,
            sender = domain.sender,
            body = domain.body,
            receiveTime = domain.receiveTime,
            hasLink = domain.hasLink,
            parseStatus = domain.parseStatus.value,
            documentIds = domain.documentIds.joinToString(","),
            hasSummons = domain.hasSummons,
            courtName = domain.courtName,
            partyName = domain.partyName
        )
    }
}
```

### 2.4 UseCase 设计

#### 2.4.1 UseCase 基类
```kotlin
// domain/usecase/base/UseCase.kt
abstract class UseCase<in P, R> {
    abstract suspend operator fun invoke(parameters: P): R
}

abstract class SuspendUseCase<in P, R> {
    abstract suspend fun execute(parameters: P): Result<R>
}
```

#### 2.4.2 示例: ProcessSmsUseCase
```kotlin
// domain/usecase/sms/ProcessSmsUseCase.kt
class ProcessSmsUseCase @Inject constructor(
    private val smsRepository: ISmsRepository,
    private val documentRepository: IDocumentRepository,
    private val calendarRepository: ICalendarRepository,
    private val parseTextUseCase: ParseTextUseCase,
    private val downloadPdfUseCase: DownloadPdfUseCase,
    private val syncToCalendarUseCase: SyncToCalendarUseCase
) : SuspendUseCase<ProcessSmsUseCase.Params, Unit>() {
    
    data class Params(
        val smsId: Long,
        val autoDownload: Boolean = true
    )
    
    override suspend fun execute(params: Params): Result<Unit> {
        val sms = smsRepository.getById(params.smsId)
            ?: return Result.Error("短信不存在")
        
        // 1. 解析短信内容
        val parseResult = parseTextUseCase(sms.body)
        
        // 2. 更新短信解析信息
        smsRepository.update(sms.copy(
            courtName = parseResult.courtName,
            partyName = parseResult.partyName,
            parseStatus = ParseStatus.SUCCESS
        ))
        
        // 3. 同步日历
        if (parseResult.hearingTime > 0) {
            syncToCalendarUseCase(SyncToCalendarUseCase.Params(
                hearingInfo = parseResult,
                sourceId = sms.id,
                sourceType = "sms"
            ))
        }
        
        // 4. 下载PDF
        if (params.autoDownload && parseResult.urls.isNotEmpty()) {
            downloadPdfUseCase(DownloadPdfUseCase.Params(
                smsId = sms.id,
                urls = parseResult.urls
            ))
        }
        
        return Result.Success(Unit)
    }
}
```

### 2.5 统一工具类设计

#### 2.5.1 日期工具
```kotlin
// util/date/DateFormats.kt
object DateFormats {
    const val DATE_TIME_MINUTE = "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm"
    const val DATE_TIME_SECOND = "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"
    const val TIME_ONLY = "HH:mm"
    const val MONTH_DAY_TIME = "MM-dd HH:mm"
    const val ICS_FORMAT = "yyyyMMdd'T'HHmmss"
}

// util/date/DateFormatter.kt
object DateFormatter {
    private val cache = mutableMapOf<String, SimpleDateFormat>()
    
    fun format(timestamp: Long, pattern: String): String {
        val sdf = cache.getOrPut(pattern) {
            SimpleDateFormat(pattern, Locale.CHINA).apply {
                timeZone = TimeZone.getTimeZone("Asia/Shanghai")
            }
        }
        return sdf.format(Date(timestamp))
    }
    
    fun formatDateTimeMinute(timestamp: Long): String = 
        format(timestamp, DateFormats.DATE_TIME_MINUTE)
    
    fun formatTimeOnly(timestamp: Long): String = 
        format(timestamp, DateFormats.TIME_ONLY)
}
```

#### 2.5.2 Toast 工具
```kotlin
// util/ui/ToastHelper.kt
object ToastHelper {
    private var currentToast: Toast? = null
    
    fun show(context: Context, message: String, duration: Int = Toast.LENGTH_SHORT) {
        currentToast?.cancel()
        currentToast = Toast.makeText(context.applicationContext, message, duration)
        currentToast?.show()
    }
    
    fun success(context: Context, message: String) {
        show(context, "✓ $message")
    }
    
    fun error(context: Context, message: String) {
        show(context, "✗ $message")
    }
    
    fun info(context: Context, message: String) {
        show(context, message)
    }
}
```

#### 2.5.3 文件工具
```kotlin
// util/file/FileHelper.kt
object FileHelper {
    fun ensureDir(dir: File): Boolean {
        return if (dir.exists()) dir.isDirectory else dir.mkdirs()
    }
    
    fun deleteIfExists(file: File): Boolean {
        return if (file.exists()) file.delete() else true
    }
    
    fun getFileSize(file: File): Long {
        return if (file.exists()) file.length() else 0L
    }
    
    fun formatSize(bytes: Long): String {
        val mb = bytes / 1048576.0
        return if (mb < 1) {
            val kb = bytes / 1024.0
            String.format("%.1f KB", kb)
        } else {
            String.format("%.1f MB", mb)
        }
    }
}

// util/file/PdfFileHelper.kt
object PdfFileHelper {
    private const val PDF_DIR = "pdfs"
    
    fun getPdfDir(context: Context): File {
        return File(context.filesDir, PDF_DIR).also { it.mkdirs() }
    }
    
    fun createPdfFile(context: Context, fileName: String): File {
        val dir = getPdfDir(context)
        return File(dir, "${System.currentTimeMillis()}_$fileName")
    }
    
    fun extractFileName(url: String): String {
        return try {
            val path = URI(url).path ?: "document.pdf"
            val name = path.substringAfterLast("/")
            if (name.isNotBlank() && name.length < 100) name else "document.pdf"
        } catch (e: Exception) {
            "document.pdf"
        }
    }
}
```

```kotlin
// util/log/Logger.kt
object Logger {
    private const val TAG_PREFIX = "CourtAssistant_"
    private var isDebug = BuildConfig.DEBUG
    
    fun d(tag: String, message: String) {
        if (isDebug) Log.d(TAG_PREFIX + tag, message)
    }
    
    fun e(tag: String, message: String, throwable: Throwable? = null) {
        if (isDebug) {
            throwable?.let { Log.e(TAG_PREFIX + tag, message, it) }
                ?: Log.e(TAG_PREFIX + tag, message)
        }
    }
    
    fun i(tag: String, message: String) {
        if (isDebug) Log.i(TAG_PREFIX + tag, message)
    }
}

// Extension for easy logging
fun Any.logD(message: String) = Logger.d(this::class.simpleName ?: "Unknown", message)
fun Any.logE(message: String, throwable: Throwable? = null) = 
    Logger.e(this::class.simpleName ?: "Unknown", message, throwable)
```

### 3.2 示例代码
```kotlin
// parser/text/pattern/CaseNoPattern.kt
object CaseNoPattern {
    private val CASE_NO_PATTERN = Pattern.compile(
        "[（(]\\s*\\d{4}\\s*[）)]\\s*[京津沪渝冀豫云辽黑湘皖鲁新苏浙赣鄂桂甘晋蒙陕吉闽贵粤川青藏琼宁]" +
        "\\s*\\d{2,4}\\s*[\\u4e00-\\u9fa5]{1,4}\\s*[\\u4e00-\\u9fa5]{0,2}\\d+\\s*号"
    )
    
    fun find(text: String): String? {
        val m = CASE_NO_PATTERN.matcher(text)
        return if (m.find()) m.group().replace("\\s+".toRegex(), "") else null
    }
}

// parser/text/extractor/TimeExtractor.kt
class TimeExtractor {
    fun extract(text: String): Long {
        TimePattern.values().forEach { pattern ->
            val m = pattern.pattern.matcher(text)
            while (m.find()) {
                val time = pattern.parse(m)
                if (time > 0) return time
            }
        }
        return 0
    }
}
```
